title: Core App — Habit Definition System
excerpt: Laid the foundation for how habits are structured in NoCap — defining the data model for habit stacks, links, and items that everything else is built on.

title: Core App — Performance Tracking
excerpt: Built the core tracking engine that records completions, measures consistency, and feeds the AI scoring pipeline with real usage data.

title: Sub-Habit Management
excerpt: Introduced HabitLinkItems — the individual components inside a HabitLink. Users can now build granular, nested habits within a single stack.

title: Time & Schedule Display
excerpt: Shipped the time and schedule layer — users can now attach days, times, and recurring windows to every habit in their stack.

title: Social Following System
excerpt: Launched the follow graph — the backbone of NoCap's social layer. Users can now follow others and see their habit progress in a shared feed.

title: Budget & Financial Tracking
excerpt: Added financial tracking to habit items — users can attach prices, set budgets, and let NoCap monitor spend across every HabitLink.

title: Select Habit From My Library
excerpt: Users can now pull habits directly from their personal library when building new stacks — no more starting from scratch every time.

title: Google Sign-In Integration
excerpt: Shipped Google OAuth for a frictionless onboarding experience. Users can now create an account or log in with a single tap.

title: CSV Importer
excerpt: Launched the CSV import pipeline — users can now bulk-load habit data from spreadsheets directly into their NoCap stacks.

title: HabitLinkItem CSV & Excel Uploads
excerpt: Extended import support to HabitLinkItems — users can now upload grocery lists, budgets, and routine items directly from Excel files.

title: Profile Screen
excerpt: Shipped the user profile screen — a central hub for your stats, habit stacks, social connections, and account settings.

title: Add HabitLinkItem
excerpt: Shipped the in-app flow for adding individual HabitLinkItems — users can now build out the granular components of any habit link on the fly.

title: Habit Tracker Calendar
excerpt: Launched the NoCap habit calendar — a visual overview of completion history, streaks, and scheduled habits across days and weeks.

title: Manual Score for HabitLinkItem
excerpt: Introduced manual scoring — users can now override or supplement the AI score on any individual habit item, giving the model better signal over time.

title: Habit Market v1 — Everything Free
excerpt: Launched the NoCap Habit Market with no payment logic — a fully open marketplace where users can discover and copy proven habit stacks from the community.

title: Unit & Measurement Fixes
excerpt: Resolved unit inconsistencies across the tracking layer — calorie counts, dollar amounts, and custom units now display and calculate correctly throughout the app.

title: Kickstarter — Ready to Publish
excerpt: NoCap's Kickstarter campaign reached publish-ready status. A major milestone on the path to funding the next phase of development.

title: Habit Market — Sell All
excerpt: Expanded the Habit Market to support full marketplace transactions — users can now list, sell, and monetize their habit stacks to the community.

title: Social Media Part 1 — Posts
excerpt: Launched the first phase of NoCap's social layer: create, view, and delete habit-tied posts. Every post is anchored to real progress — no noise, just growth.

title: Social Media Part 2 — Comments
excerpt: Added comments to the social feed. Users can now engage with each other's habit progress, offer encouragement, and build accountability in public.

title: Social Media Part 3 — Search
excerpt: Shipped social search — find users, habit stacks, and community content. Discovery is now a first-class feature in the NoCap social experience.

title: App-Wide Clean Up
excerpt: A focused sprint to clean up technical debt, improve performance, and sharpen the UI across the app ahead of the AI feature rollout.

title: NoCap API Swap v0.0.0.1
excerpt: Shipped the first version of the NoCap Swap API — the engine that powers AI-driven alternative suggestions for underperforming habit components.

title: NoCap AI Score v0.0.0.1
excerpt: Launched the first version of AI habit scoring — every habit now gets a live 0–100% score, with Good, Bad, and Swap classifications generated by the model.

title: Swap & Generator — Save Results
excerpt: Users can now save NoCap Swap suggestions and AI-generated habit ideas directly into their stacks — bridging the gap between recommendation and action.

title: NoCap YouTube Videos
excerpt: Producing a series of YouTube videos walking through NoCap features, habit-building strategies, and behind-the-scenes product development. Coming soon.

title: NoCap Subscriptions
excerpt: Launching paid subscription tiers — Go, Plus, Pro, and Business — unlocking AI credits, advanced scoring, and the full NoCap feature set.

title: Habit Market — Buy AI Credits
excerpt: Introducing AI credit purchases inside the Habit Market — users will be able to top up their NoCap AI usage directly from within the app.

title: In-App Ads Integration
excerpt: Adding an ad layer to support the free tier — a lightweight, non-intrusive experience that keeps NoCap accessible to everyone.

title: NoCap AI Chat v0.0.0.1
excerpt: The first version of NoCap's AI chat assistant — ask questions about your habits, get personalized coaching, and receive real-time guidance from the AI.

title: Social Media Part 4 — Videos & Reels
excerpt: Bringing video to NoCap's social layer — share short-form habit progress clips and reels directly from within the app.

title: Habit Partners
excerpt: Team up with a partner to tackle habits together — shared stacks, mutual accountability, and combined AI scoring for pairs and small groups.

title: UI Clean Up — Final Polish
excerpt: A full design pass across every screen — refining spacing, typography, and interactions to bring the NoCap experience to its v1 visual standard.
